articles.title: Splatoon Raiders Direct 6.30.2026 - Nintendo
articles.description: Join us on June 30 at 7am PT for the Splatoon Raiders Direct! The presentation will last roughly 15 minutes and provide more info on the upcoming Nintendo Switch 2 game.

articles.title: US bill requiring paid games to be playable after they shut down has failed to pass a Senate vote - Video Games Chronicle
articles.description: Stop Killing Games says it will try again with "the funding to do this properly"

articles.title: Best Prime Day Deals Under $50 on Ninja, Anker and Samsung - CNET
articles.description: From everyday essentials to fun finds, these affordable picks are worth shopping ahead of the holiday weekend.
